themes.title: Core Migration
themes.description: Focus on migrating core components to ensure stability and performance.

themes.title: Monitoring and Alerts
themes.description: Implement monitoring and alerting systems to enhance operational awareness.

themes.title: Performance Optimization
themes.description: Evaluate and implement solutions for performance improvements.

milestones.name: Migrate to Kafka 3.7+
milestones.description: Complete migration from Apache Kafka 2.x to Kafka 3.7+.
milestones.success_criteria: Successful migration with no critical issues reported for 30 days.

milestones.name: Evaluate ETL Alternatives
milestones.description: Assess alternatives to VendorX's ETL SDK.
milestones.success_criteria: Complete evaluation report with at least 3 viable alternatives identified.

milestones.name: Monitor Events Processed
milestones.description: Implement monitoring for events processed per day.
milestones.success_criteria: Monitoring system operational with daily reports generated for 30 days.

milestones.name: Monitor Critical CVEs
milestones.description: Set up monitoring for critical CVEs.
milestones.success_criteria: Monitoring system operational with alerts triggered for critical CVEs.

milestones.name: Implement Automated CVE Alerting
milestones.success_criteria: Automated alerts operational with no false positives for 30 days.

milestones.name: Track EOL Dependencies
milestones.description: Implement tracking for services on EOL dependencies.
milestones.success_criteria: Tracking system operational with reports generated for EOL dependencies.

milestones.name: Evaluate Multi-Region Caching
milestones.success_criteria: Evaluation report completed with at least 2 recommended solutions.

milestones.name: Conduct CVE Remediation Experiment
milestones.description: Conduct an experiment to assess CVE remediation impact.
milestones.success_criteria: Experiment completed with documented results and recommendations.

sequencing.reason: Automated CVE alerting depends on the monitoring of critical CVEs.
Tracking EOL dependencies requires the implementation of automated CVE alerting.
Evaluating multi-region caching solutions requires tracking of EOL dependencies.
Conducting the CVE remediation experiment relies on the evaluation of multi-region caching.

mvp.goal: Establish core functionality and monitoring for critical components.
